items.title: GitHub - CarlosIbCu/polymarket-kalshi-btc-arbitrage-bot: Real-time arbitrage bot
items.author: github.com
items.snippet: Prediction market platforms like Kalshi, Polymarket, and Manifold Markets have seen a surge in automated and algorithmic trading strategies. Kalshi, a CFTC-regulated exchange commanding 62% of on-chain prediction market volume (~$500M+ weekly), offers a robust REST API that developers have used to build bots implementing probability mispricing detection, Kelly Criterion position sizing, and cross-platform arbitrage. items.title: Out of Sample Testing | Algorithmic Trading Strategies
items.author: www.buildalpha.com
items.snippet: Discussion in the r/algotrading and r/quant communities consistently highlights the gap between backtest and live trading performance as a central challenge. Reddit posts from the algotrading community in 2025-2026 show traders sharing live paper trading results (e.g., strategies exploiting mispricing between Polymarket traders, or systems approaching 60% returns since August 2025 with 5% max drawdown), while simultaneously warning that most impressive backtests are statistical illusions caused
